item.title: The AI threat wrecked software stocks. Now financial stocks look next with LPL closing 8% lower
item.description: Financial services firms tanked after the launch of a new AI-powered tax planning tool that promises to do the work "within minutes."

item.title: Vatican Bank makes first foray into equity indexes, setting stage for potential ETF launches
item.description: The Holy See-linked bank debuted two indexes tracking 50 stocks that it said align with Catholic teachings, marking a push into retail investment prod...

item.title: This unloved sector is holding up in 2026, and Wolfe likes one specific income play
item.description: The real estate sector was unremarkable last year, even as the Fed eased borrowing costs, but it held its own as stocks sold off last week.

item.title: Overseas equities are beating their U.S. peers. What's next after this outperformance, per the charts
item.description: A surge in international and emerging markets equities raises the question of whether we’re in the early stages of a regime shift or is this just a tr...

item.title: Investor Stephanie Link likes this robotics play, a 'sleeper name for 2026'
item.description: Stephanie Link scooped up shares of Rockwell Automation following the robotics firm's latest earnings beat.
